01_initial_request.input_data: Existing literature and studies on AXL expression, mechanisms, and cancer drug resistance
01_initial_request.user_intent: To summarize AXL's structure, mechanisms, and expression patterns, and discuss the potential of AXL inhibitors in cancer treatment

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] AXL is a member of the TAM receptor tyrosine kinases family with abnormal expression linked to cancer prognosis. [Gap] The detailed structural domains of AXL required for ligand binding and activation are not fully visualized in the context of this review. [Decision] To achieve understanding of AXL's structure, chose to use Protein Data Bank to perform structural visualization on AXL protein, expecting to obtain domain composition details.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: AXL protein comprises an intracellular domain, single helix transmembrane region, two fibronectin type III (FNIII) domains, and two immunoglobulin (IG)-like domains.

references.relevance: Provides visual representation of AXL and GAS6 structure from PDB identifier 2C5D.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] AXL expression has been linked to clinicopathological features and poor prognosis. [Gap] Specific expression patterns across different cancer types need confirmation. [Decision] To achieve identification of expression patterns, chose to use mRNA expression analysis to perform expression profiling on cancer tissues, expecting to obtain correlation with survival rates.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Upregulated AXL mRNA expression observed in ccRCC, associated with worse overall survival (OS) and can serve as an independent predictor of prognosis.

references.relevance: Evidence linking high AXL expression to poor prognosis in various cancers.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] AXL activation involves ligand binding and dimerization. [Gap] Interactions with other receptors affecting activation are not fully defined. [Decision] To achieve mechanism elucidation, chose to use Co-immunoprecipitation to perform protein interaction mapping on AXL and TYRO3 receptors, expecting to obtain association data.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: AXL and TYRO3 receptors are closely associated, which significantly enhance GAS6 mediated AXL phosphorylation.

references.relevance: Demonstrates physical association between AXL and TYRO3 enhancing phosphorylation.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] AXL mediates drug resistance in various cancers. [Gap] Efficacy of AXL inhibitors in living systems needs validation. [Decision] To achieve validation of therapeutic potential, chose to use In Vivo Mouse Model to perform survival analysis on GBM mice, expecting to obtain survival period data.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Combination of nivolumab and BGB324 prolongs the survival period of mice with GBM.

references.relevance: Shows in vivo efficacy of AXL inhibition combined with immunotherapy.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Drug resistance remains a major obstacle to effective therapeutic interventions. [Gap] Sensitivity of cancer cells to combination therapy involving AXL inhibitors is unclear. [Decision] To achieve assessment of drug sensitivity, chose to use In Vitro Cell Assay to perform chemotherapy efficacy testing on cancer cells, expecting to obtain effectiveness comparison.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Carboplatin/paclitaxel combined with AVB-S6-500 is more effective than chemotherapy alone.

references.relevance: Provides experimental data on combination therapy efficacy in vitro and in vivo.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Preclinical data suggests AXL inhibitors are promising. [Gap] Clinical safety and efficacy in humans remain to be established. [Decision] To achieve clinical validation, chose to use Clinical Trial to perform evaluation of Anti-AXL CAR-T-cell therapy, expecting to obtain trial status and efficacy data.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Currently under clinical trials with significant effect on AXL-positive osteomyeloid leukemia cells and TNBC cell models.

references.relevance: Indicates ongoing clinical evaluation of AXL-targeted immunotherapy.

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Literature Review and Meta-Analysis of Preclinical and Clinical Studies

survival_extension.interpretation: Combination of nivolumab and BGB324 prolongs survival in GBM mice.

treatment_efficacy.interpretation: Carboplatin/paclitaxel with AVB-S6-500 outperforms chemotherapy alone.

prognostic_value.interpretation: High AXL expression predicts poor overall survival in ccRCC.

03_success_verification.final_verdict: The research objective to summarize AXL's structure, mechanisms, and expression patterns and discuss the potential of AXL inhibitors in cancer treatment is achieved. Evidence supports that targeting AXL weakens cancer cells' drug resistance.
